flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at East Arkansas Community College are 17% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($28.5k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at East Arkansas Community College rose 74% between 2017 and 2020 ($3.5k → $6.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at East Arkansas Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (492 vs 650).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Arkansas Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.7k → $4.4k).
